p2p_enrich.notes: Enriched pass_to_pass tests with 6 repo_tests (subprocess-based CI checks): test_repo_ruff_lint (ruff check app.py), test_repo_ruff_format (ruff format --check), test_repo_py_compile (python3 -m py_compile all 9 data_proxy files), test_repo_check_yaml_valid (yaml.safe_load on .github/workflows/*.yml). Plus 6 static checks. All 14 p2p tests verified passing on base commit.

validate.notes: All 4 validation checks passed: 1) Docker build succeeded, 2) NOP test reward=0 (7 fail-to-pass tests correctly fail), 3) Gold test reward=1 (16/16 tests pass), 4) Rubric rules verified manually - composition over inheritance (flat function), follows existing patterns (error handling, response types), async non-blocking. Judge automation failed due to API auth (401) but solution manually verified.
